data.name: AFTER FLY
data.description: AFTER FLY is an Indore run-and-rave organizer discovered through a public Luma event page. This unclaimed profile summarizes owner-safe public facts while claim, cadence, and contact details remain unverified.

eventSuccess.hostGoal: Help runners meet through a shared run and post-run social.

publicProfile.headline: AFTER FLY run club in Indore
publicProfile.summary: AFTER FLY is an Indore run-and-rave organizer discovered through a public Luma event page. This unclaimed profile summarizes verified public facts for owner review and stays out of search until cadence, contact, and claim details are confirmed.
publicProfile.sourceSummary: A public Luma event page confirms AFTER FLY hosted AFTERFLY TAKEOFF RUN & RAVE in Indore on 2025-03-16. The page describes a movement-and-music community and the embedded event data lists Instagram handle afterfly.in.

facts.label: Format
facts.value: Run club plus post-run music social

fitNotes: Repeatable run-club programming is a strong Catch organizer category because guests already share a live activity.
Indore gives the first test outside the largest metros, which helps validate city coverage and source sparsity.
Run-and-rave programming is a useful adjacency test because it blends low-pressure activity, curated crowd energy, and a post-event social setting.
missingEvidence: Owner or host contact outside platform relay
Whether the public Instagram handle is the preferred owner contact

eventEvidence.title: AFTERFLY TAKEOFF RUN & RAVE
eventEvidence.summary: The public Luma page lists a Sunday social run from Traffic Park near Daly College followed by a post-run techno social at Tropico Cafe.
facts: Run segment described as 2.2 km and optional for walkers
Page copy states INR 499 per person with payment link sent by Instagram DM after registering
Luma registration is closed on the public page
